title: Fix `claude update` downloading 226 MB every time (Issue #51243)

snippet: Every time you run claude update, it downloads the full release tarball (~226 MB) — even when your installation is already the latest version. On typical WSL2 connections this is ~30 s of wall time and ~226 MB of silently-metered bandwidth per check.

title: Prevent Claude Code from Dropping Your Database — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can run DROP DATABASE, prisma migrate reset, rails db:drop. A PreToolUse hook blocks destructive database commands. Protect your production data.

snippet: Claude Code can run DROP DATABASE, prisma migrate reset, rails db:drop, or php artisan migrate:fresh without warning in Auto Mode. One command and your production data is gone.

title: Stop Claude Code from Retrying Denied Commands — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code ignores 'No' permission responses and retries denied commands in a loop. Fix it with a PreToolUse hook that tracks and blocks re-attempts.
keywords: claude code ignore no, claude code retry denied, claude code permission loop, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: You say "No" to a command. Claude runs it anyway. Then asks for the next command. The only way to stop it is Ctrl+C.

title: Prevent Claude Code from Installing Random Dependencies — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can run npm install, pip install, and add unwanted dependencies. Block unauthorized package installations with a PreToolUse hook.
keywords: claude code npm install, claude code pip install, dependency guard, supply chain attack, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code can run npm install, pip install, and other package managers freely. When it encounters a missing module, its natural behavior is to install it — without asking. This creates supply chain risks and dependency bloat.

title: Prevent Claude Code from Committing .env Files — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can git add .env and commit your API keys. A PreToolUse hook blocks .env from being staged, even with git add . or git add -A. Instant protection.
keywords: claude code env file, claude code git add env, claude code api key commit, secret guard hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code runs git add . or git add -A and your .env with API keys gets staged. If followed by git commit and git push, your secrets are public.

title: Prevent Claude Code Force-Push to Main — cc-safe-setup

keywords: claude code force push, claude code git push main, claude code branch protection, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: In autonomous mode, Claude Code can run git push --force origin main and rewrite your shared branch history. This has happened to real users during overnight sessions.

title: Prevent Claude Code git reset --hard Disasters — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can run git reset --hard and wipe all uncommitted work. Real incidents from GitHub Issues. One command to prevent it: npx cc-safe-setup.
keywords: claude code git reset hard, claude code lose changes, claude code undo, destructive git commands, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: git reset --hard destroys all uncommitted changes instantly. No confirmation, no recycle bin, no undo. Claude Code runs it when it thinks "starting fresh" is the fastest path forward.

title: Prevent Claude Code --no-verify Bypass — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code used --no-verify on 6 consecutive commits, bypassing pre-commit hooks silently. Block it with a PreToolUse hook. One command: npx cc-safe-setup.
keywords: claude code no-verify, claude code bypass pre-commit, claude code git hooks, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup, git commit no-verify
snippet: Claude Code can use --no-verify to skip your pre-commit hooks entirely — even when your CLAUDE.md explicitly forbids it.

title: Prevent Accidental npm publish from Claude Code — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can accidentally run npm publish and push unfinished code to the public registry. Block it with a PreToolUse hook. Works in Auto Mode.
keywords: claude code npm publish, accidental npm publish, npm publish guard, claude code package publish, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code can run npm publish during a refactoring session, pushing half-finished code to the public npm registry. In Auto Mode, there's no confirmation prompt.

title: Prevent Claude Code rm -rf Disasters — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can run rm -rf and delete your entire filesystem. Real incidents from GitHub Issues. One command to prevent it: npx cc-safe-setup.
keywords: claude code rm -rf, claude code delete files, claude code safety, destructive command guard, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code has full terminal access. It can — and has — run rm -rf / and deleted entire filesystems. These aren't hypothetical risks. They're real incidents reported on GitHub.

title: Prevent Claude Code from Leaking Secrets — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can commit .env files, API keys, and credentials to public repos via git add. A PreToolUse hook catches it before the commit. npx cc-safe-setup.
keywords: claude code secrets, claude code env file, claude code api keys, git add env, secret leak prevention, pretooluse hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code can run git add . and commit your .env file, API keys, SSH keys, and other credentials to a public repository. This happens silently during autonomous sessions.

title: Prevent Claude Code Session Drift After 6 Hours — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code degrades after 6+ hours — ignoring rules, creating duplicates. A hook that progressively tightens safety.
keywords: claude code session drift, long session degradation, session-drift-guard
snippet: Claude Code degrades after 6+ hours — ignoring rules, creating duplicates. A hook that progressively tightens safety.

title: Prevent Claude Code Syntax Errors Cascading — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code can introduce syntax errors that cascade through dozens of files. A PostToolUse hook catches them immediately. npx cc-safe-setup.
keywords: claude code syntax error, claude code breaks code, claude code validation, posttooluse hook, syntax check hook, cc-safe-setup
snippet: Claude Code edits files one after another. When it introduces a syntax error in file #1, it doesn't notice. It moves to file #2, which imports file #1. Now file #2 breaks. By the time it stops, 30 files have cascading errors.

title: Prevent Claude Code Temp File Accumulation — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code creates hundreds of temp files in /tmp that are never cleaned up. Prevent disk exhaustion with a Stop hook that auto-deletes session artifacts.
keywords: claude code temp files, claude code /tmp, claude code disk full, stop hook cleanup, cc-safe-setup, temp file accumulation
snippet: Claude Code creates /tmp/claude-*-cwd files for directory tracking but never cleans them up. Over time, hundreds of files accumulate, consuming disk space and inodes.

title: Prevent Claude Code Token Waste from Excessive File Reading — cc-safe-setup
description: Claude Code reads too many files, consuming 25% of token quota before working. A read budget hook.
keywords: claude code token waste, excessive reading, read-budget-guard
snippet: Claude Code reads too many files, consuming 25% of token quota before working. A read budget hook.
